tasks.title: BDC Commercial Mortgage — Backup Financing Playbook
tasks.summary: Complete BDC CRE loan analysis for Montreal condo backup path. Key findings: BDC offers up to 100% LTV, 25-year amortization, 36-month interest-only option. Critical advantage: BDC already has $6M mezz facility with Revaly. Timeline is tight (25 days to close), but existing relationship could accelerate. Talking points prepared for when Nick makes the BDC intro. Comparison table vs NBC/BNC included. Private lender Plan C also outlined.
